title: add vector advection tests

body:
Here are some convergence tests for 
- [x] `GradientF2C`
- [x] `DivergenceF2C`
- [x] `GradientC2F` (both with `SetValue` and `SetGradient` BCs)
- [x] `DivergenceC2F` (both with `SetValue` and `SetDivergence` BCs)
in 1D, on a uniform mesh.
title: Convergence tests for FD operators in 1D
